# Anix Lynch — AI/Data Engineer, Los Angeles

> Anix Lynch is an LA-based AI and Data Engineer specializing in GenAI
> systems, RAG pipelines, and healthcare AI applications on GCP, AWS, and Azure.
> Available for senior AI/Data Engineering roles.

## Expertise
- GenAI: RAG, LLM agents, Vertex AI, Gemini, Claude, OpenAI, AWS Bedrock
- Data Engineering: dbt, BigQuery, Pub/Sub streaming, medallion architecture, Microsoft Fabric
- Cloud: GCP (Cloud Run, BigQuery, Vertex AI, Pub/Sub), AWS (Bedrock, S3, DynamoDB), Azure (Fabric, Power BI, TMDL)
- Stack: Python, FastAPI, Docker, n8n, Google Maps Platform, GAM

## Verified Projects (live on GitHub: github.com/anix-lynch)
- healthcare-signal-platform: anomaly detection + Vertex AI grounded RAG + 3-cloud portability (GCP/AWS/Azure)
- healthcare-ai-data-engineer: 50k rows, dbt, Pub/Sub → BigQuery streaming, Great Expectations quality gates
- mocktailverse-bedrock: AWS Bedrock + pgvector + LangChain RAG pipeline
- healthcare-da: Microsoft Fabric + Power BI Direct Lake + dbt + TMDL + DAX
- healthcare-genai-engineer: BM25 + Sentence Transformers + RRF hybrid retrieval
- baymax: closed-loop agent with attention routing, safety brakes, and outcome verification

## Stack (verified live, 2026)
GCP: Cloud Run (7 services) · BigQuery (50k rows, partitioned + clustered) · Pub/Sub · Cloud Scheduler · Vertex AI · Gemini 2.5 · Artifact Registry · Cloud Build · Google Maps Platform · GAM (2 Workspace domains)
AWS: Bedrock (Claude via boto3) · S3 (Parquet landing) · DynamoDB (PAY_PER_REQUEST) · LangChain · pgvector
Azure: Microsoft Fabric · Power BI Direct Lake · dbt-fabric · TMDL · DAX · MLflow · Azure AD
Python · FastAPI · Pydantic · Docker · GitHub Actions · n8n · Great Expectations · Feast

## Location
Los Angeles, California, USA
